overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a stormy rural landscape. The scene features heavy rain, dark storm clouds, and distant mountains while the character travels from open grassland toward a forested area and distant village.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural grassland with distant village and mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path with swords strapped to his back, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: muddy trail winding through the grassland
cluster of wooden buildings visible on the hillside in the distance
snow-capped peaks visible through the storm clouds
weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
dense coniferous trees covering the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rural landscape during a heavy storm. Geralt walks along a muddy dirt path bordered by wooden fences, with a distant village visible on the left hillside and majestic mountains looming ahead through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with dense pine trees

events.description: character follows the path as it curves left into denser forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns left along the winding path, moving deeper into the wooded area with trees closing in on both sides

entered.detail: thick forest of tall pine trees creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: As the path curves left, the open grassland gives way to a denser forest environment. The wooden fence shifts to the right side while tall pine trees close in, partially obscuring the stormy sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest path with rocky outcrops

events.description: abandoned red wooden cart comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the narrowing trail, navigating through the dense forest vegetation

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rocky terrain on the left side
abandoned wooden cart with red paint weathered by the elements

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly as it winds through dense forest with rocky outcrops on the left. The lighting grows darker under the thick tree canopy until an abandoned red wooden cart appears on the right side of the path.

events.description: character passes the abandoned red cart on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the red cart and continues toward the settlement visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: wooden village structures with lit windows becoming visible through the trees
low stone wall running alongside the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The path widens slightly as Geralt passes the abandoned cart and approaches a rural settlement. Stone walls replace the rocky outcrops on the left, while the dense forest shifts to the left side as wooden village buildings with warm lights become visible through the rain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy rural landscape that transitions from open grasslands into a dense forest and finally toward a lit village. It begins on a wide, rain-swept vista where Geralt walks along a muddy path bordered by wooden fences with distant mountains looming through the storm. As the path curves left, the open terrain gives way to a denser forest environment where tall pine trees close in and partially obscure the dark sky. The trail then narrows further, winding past rocky outcrops under a darkening canopy until an abandoned red wooden cart appears on the right. Finally, the path widens as the forest shifts to the left and stone walls emerge, leading toward a rural settlement where the warm lights of wooden buildings glow through the heavy rain.
